page.content: In the study, the parameters examined included Height (cm), Weight (kg), and BMI (kg/m2) across five groups: C group (n= 37), E group (n= 37), B group (n= 34), COM group (n= 40), and P group (n= 34). The Height (cm) measurements were recorded as follows: C group at 172.64±5.78, E group at 174.45±6.38, B group at 176.85±7.9, COM group at 175.82±8.8, and P group at 173.90±7.8. Weight (kg) before the intervention showed C group at 83.25±14.69, E group at 83.28±14.82, B group at 84.19±16.0, COM group at 83.40±162, and P group at 82.06±13.5; while after the intervention, the values were C group at 83.36±14.58, E group at 83.63±15.35, B group at 84.2±16.16, COM group at 84.38±192, and P group at 82.13±13.7.

page.content: The P values for Weight (kg) before were 0.236 for C group, 0.357 for E group, 0.540 for B group, 0.664 for COM group, and 0.740 for P group. Regarding BMI (kg/m2), before the intervention, values were C group at 27.86±4.26, E group at 27.28±4.05, B group at 26.90±4.66, COM group at 26.84±3.1, and P group at 27.06±3.73; after the intervention, the values were C group at 27.91±4.27, E group at 27.39±4.27, B group at 26.91±4.68, COM group at 27.15±4.92, and P group at 27.08±3.70, with respective P values of 0.138, 0.396, 0.722, 0.691, and 0.679.
